youtube_id: PENDING — YouTube daily upload quota exceeded 2026-06-16; Chau to upload out-word-cloud-r4/word-cloud-narrated-r4.webm manually as unlisted, then update this field + article embed in using-the-word-cloud-slide.md (replace L89bd83WaYU). List L89bd83WaYU for deletion.
notes: r6: Fixed abrupt ending — extended visual track (word-cloud-final-r4.webm, 53.72s) by freezing last frame for 7s using tpad filter (total visual: 60.72s). Audio stream ends at 59.71s (s10 wc-present: start 50.75s + 8.96s). Video now ends ~1s after last word. r5 had video stream DURATION 53.72s vs audio 59.67s causing cut mid-sentence. silencedetect -40dB d=1s: no gaps. 11-track mix. VO overlap check: PASS. Axis-2: article step-table added to using-the-word-cloud-slide.md.
mix_command: # Step 1: Pad visual — ffmpeg -y -i out-word-cloud-r4/word-cloud-final-r4.webm -vf 'tpad=stop_mode=clone:stop_duration=7' -c:v libvpx-vp9 -b:v 0 -crf 33 -pix_fmt yuv420p -an /tmp/wc-r6-visual-padded.webm; Step 2: Mix — ffmpeg -y -i /tmp/wc-r6-visual-padded.webm -i out-word-cloud-r4/vo/s01.mp3 -i out-word-cloud-r4/vo/s02.mp3 -i out-word-cloud-r4/vo/s03.mp3 -i out-word-cloud-r4/vo/s04.mp3 -i out-word-cloud-r4/vo/s05.mp3 -i out-word-cloud-r4/vo/s06.mp3 -i out-word-cloud-r4/vo/s07.mp3 -i out-word-cloud-r5/vo/s_bridge.mp3 -i out-word-cloud-r4/vo/s08.mp3 -i out-word-cloud-r4/vo/s09.mp3 -i out-word-cloud-r4/vo/s10.mp3 -filter_complex '[1:a]adelay=0|0[a1];[2:a]adelay=8250|8250[a2];[3:a]adelay=10600|10600[a3];[4:a]adelay=14540|14540[a4];[5:a]adelay=18800|18800[a5];[6:a]adelay=27710|27710[a6];[7:a]adelay=30640|30640[a7];[8:a]adelay=36520|36520[a8];[9:a]adelay=42000|42000[a9];[10:a]adelay=47330|47330[a10];[11:a]adelay=50750|50750[a11];[a1][a2][a3][a4][a5][a6][a7][a8][a9][a10][a11]amix=inputs=11:normalize=0[aout]' -map 0:v -map '[aout]' -c:v copy -c:a libopus -b:a 64k out-word-cloud-r6/word-cloud-narrated-r6.webm

steps.display_text: A Word Cloud slide lets participants submit words and phrases, and displays them all on screen — with the most popular growing largest at the centre.
steps.tts_text: A Word Cloud slide lets participants submit words and phrases, and displays them all on screen — with the most popular growing largest at the center.

steps.display_text: Click New Presentation to open a fresh deck.
steps.tts_text: Click New Presentation to open a fresh deck.

steps.display_text: Select Word Cloud from the slide type picker — it's in the Interactive section.
steps.tts_text: Select Word Cloud from the slide type picker — it's in the Interactive section.

steps.display_text: Type the prompt your audience will respond to. A short, open-ended question works best.
steps.tts_text: Type the prompt your audience will respond to. A short, open-ended question works best.

steps.display_text: Choose how many words each participant can submit — from 1 to 10. The default of 3 is a great starting point. You'll also find options for a time limit, profanity filter, and hiding results in the same panel.
steps.tts_text: Choose how many words each participant can submit — from 1 to 10. The default of 3 is a great starting point. You'll also find options for a time limit, profanity filter, and hiding results in the same panel.

steps.display_text: Click Preview to see how the cloud looks before you go live.
steps.tts_text: Click Preview to see how the cloud looks before you go live.

steps.display_text: On the participant screen, audience members type their words and tap Submit — watch the cloud react instantly.
steps.tts_text: On the participant screen, audience members type their words and tap Submit — watch the cloud react instantly.

steps.display_text: As responses come in, the cloud builds live — the more often a word is submitted, the bigger it grows.
steps.tts_text: As responses come in, the cloud builds live — the more often a word is submitted, the bigger it grows.

steps.display_text: Each word lands in the cloud in a random colour, and the most-submitted word grows biggest at the centre.
steps.tts_text: Each word lands in the cloud in a random color, and the most-submitted word grows biggest at the center.

steps.display_text: Exit preview and head back to the editor to fine-tune your settings.
steps.tts_text: Exit preview and head back to the editor to fine-tune your settings.

steps.display_text: That's your Word Cloud slide set up. Hit Present — participants join on their phones, type their responses, and tap Submit. The cloud builds in real time right in front of the whole room.
steps.tts_text: That's your Word Cloud slide set up. Hit Present — participants join on their phones, type their responses, and tap Submit. The cloud builds in real time right in front of the whole room.
